creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
The mastersite seems to have changed paths in the ftp directory.
The Makfile says 
MASTER_SITES=   ftp://ftp.netwinsite.com/pub/netwinsite/dnews
but it is now
MASTER_SITES=   ftp://ftp.netwinsite.com/pub/dnews

Fix: 

Change the path from pub/netwinsite/dnews to pub/dnews
in the MASTER_SITES line.
How-To-Repeat: Try to fetch it from the mastersite :-).
